author: Mechanism
text: Child bl-b0b9 (plugin-config split audit) complete -- verdict: interim split is structurally coherent for fresh post-bl-8a9a repos. Two follow-up bugs filed: bl-1d81 (bl plugin enable config_file unresolvable at runtime, pre-existing in bl-32e5) and bl-de57 (legacy repos with committed .balls/plugins/* not cleanly migrated; overlaps bl-dc2b). No project.json-ball contradiction. -- Mechanism

author: Hector
text:
Parent verdict (Hector, 2026-05-23): CONFORMANT to SPEC-tracker-state.md as delivered on main 76448e9. Walked §2 invariants 1-9, §6/§7/§8/§9 mechanism, §11 merge cleanliness, §12 backwards-compat matrix, and §16 conformance tests 1-14 against the shipped code; 1166/1166 cargo tests green.

Findings:

§2 invariants — all hold. The unified .balls/state-repo (state_repo::ensure) is the one mechanism; the warm/cold split is one-shot bootstrap, not a steady-state mode. Config split is enforced via ProjectConfig::resolve (project wins outright). Hard-fail/soft-fail behave per §9.

§16 conformance — 15 test functions for 14 SPEC bullets (t7 is t7a explicit-hard-fail + t7b implicit-local-fallback), all passing: conformance_model t1/t2/t13/t14, conformance_config t5/t6, conformance_reach t4/t7a/t7b/t8, conformance_remaster t3/t9/t10, conformance_federated t11/t12.

Two minor strict-reading notes, neither a behaviour gap:
  - §16.10's id-clash-rename half is tested in tests/tracker_state.rs (remaster_reconcile_renames_an_id_clash) rather than tests/conformance_remaster.rs. Spec intent covered; placement only.
  - §16.14 sets up 2 of the 3 §13 symlinks; the third (.balls/project.json) is materialized by state_repo::ensure_project_config's warm-path repair, so Store::discover accepts the hand-built layout. Test passes its assertion; it does not literally drive the full §13 sequence.

§12 backwards-compat — rows 1, 2, 5, 6 covered by tests (t1, tracker_address_tests + remaster_retires_a_legacy_master_json_pointer, t4, t9); row 3 documented (mitigation = min_bl_version, advisory wired through ProjectConfig::load); row 4 covered by forward_compat.rs.

Carry-forward bugs from the child audits, still open, NOT re-filed:
  - bl-1d81 (bl plugin enable writes config_file the plugin runtime cannot resolve; pre-bl-8a9a in bl-32e5) — bl-b0b9
  - bl-de57 (legacy committed .balls/plugins/* not cleanly migrated; §12 has no row for this case) — bl-b0b9
  - bl-3f59 (state_branch resolution + materialization wired but lifecycle traffic hardcoded; bl-022c installed the ensure_supported gate) — bl-022c
  - bl-c7b5, bl-73bb (bare-hub migration concerns) — bl-dc2b

bl-2b49's §16.13 fix landed as b72bdb3.

No new bugs surfaced by the parent meta-audit. Closing as conformant; the four follow-ups above are the open work that remains under bl-e118.

author: Hector
text:
Audit verdict: SPEC-tracker-state.md conformant on main 76448e9

Walked §2 invariants 1-9, §6-§9 mechanism, §11 merge cleanliness, §12 backwards-compat matrix, and §16 conformance tests 1-14 against the shipped code; 1166/1166 cargo tests green.

No new bugs filed. Carry-forward follow-ups from the four child audits remain open under bl-e118: bl-1d81, bl-de57, bl-3f59, bl-c7b5, bl-73bb. bl-2b49's §16.13 fix landed as b72bdb3. Full verdict on the ball's notes.
